overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a video game depicting a gothic library interior with high vaulted stone ceilings and arches. Students in wizard robes study at wooden tables while warm chandelier light mixes with natural window light in an atmospheric academic setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic library reading room with study tables and bookshelves

agents.ego_description: stationary camera observing the library interior and students studying at their tables

notable_agents.action: student in grey robes seated and reading a book at a wooden table in the foreground
student in blue robes walking across the library floor from left to right in the background

entered.detail: high arched stone ceiling with ribbed vaulting and Gothic architectural details
tall stone columns supporting the arched ceiling along the left wall
long wooden study table with books and papers scattered on the surface
built-in stone bookshelves filled with books lining the left wall
ornate iron chandelier hanging from the ceiling providing warm light
large decorative rug covering the central floor area with intricate patterns

segments.scene_description: A static view of a grand Gothic library interior with high vaulted stone ceilings and arches. In the foreground, a student in grey robes reads at a wooden table, while another student in blue robes walks across the background. The room features stone bookshelves, hanging iron chandeliers, and an ornate central rug over marble flooring.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric view of a grand Gothic library that emphasizes the stillness and scale of an academic sanctuary. It begins by capturing the immense height of the vaulted stone ceilings and arches, framing the architectural depth of the room. The focus then settles on a student in grey robes reading at a wooden table in the foreground, while the space behind them remains active as another student in blue robes walks across the marble flooring. The scene finally encompasses the rich textures of the environment, from the stone bookshelves and ornate central rug to the warm glow of hanging iron chandeliers.
